preview.summary: A Group A meeting of Hugo Broos's rebuilt Bafana Bafana against a South Korea side led by captain Son Heung-min. With co-hosts Mexico in the group, both could be fighting for crucial points in Monterrey.
preview.homeForm: South Africa reached their best FIFA ranking in over 25 years at 60th, reward for Broos's steady rebuild since 2021.
preview.awayForm: South Korea dominated AFC Group C with five wins and no defeats, qualifying for a 12th World Cup and ranked 25th.
preview.homeKey: Ronwen Williams, captain and penalty-saving hero in goal.
preview.awayKey: Son Heung-min, talisman captain at his fourth World Cup.
storylines: Son Heung-min leading Korea at his fourth and likely final World Cup
Broos's disciplined Bafana chasing a rare World Cup knockout berth
Williams' shot-stopping versus Korea's Lee Kang-in and Hwang Hee-chan
preview.h2h: The sides have met sparingly, with their friendlies historically tight and low-scoring.
